class.name: HEGoAPI
class.brief_description: Singleton entry point for HEGo session management and HDA discovery.
class.description:
This class owns the internal [code]HEGoSessionManager[/code], initializes the Houdini API platform layer, and exposes session controls to scripts.
The singleton is created during module initialization and is intended to be reused for the whole runtime.
It also stores [code]hego/houdini_installation_path[/code] in Godot project settings. That path is used when filtering built-in Houdini libraries from [method get_hda_libraries].

method.name: get_hda_libraries
method.description:
Returns metadata for currently loaded non-built-in HDA libraries.
The dictionary is keyed by library name when available (otherwise by library id as a string). Each value contains: - [code]id[/code]: HAPI asset library id. - [code]file_path[/code]: source library path. - [code]name[/code]: basename without extension. - [code]asset_count[/code]: number of available assets in the library. - [code]assets[/code]: [PackedStringArray] of operator names.
Returns an empty dictionary if no session is active, if no libraries are loaded, or if querying HAPI fails.

method.name: get_houdini_installation_path
method.description: Returns the configured Houdini installation path from project settings.

method.name: get_singleton
method.description: Returns the global [HEGoAPI] singleton instance created during module initialization.

method.name: is_session_active
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] when the Houdini Engine session is currently active.

method.name: start_session
method.description:
Starts a Houdini Engine session and initializes HAPI.
[code]connection_type[/code] maps to [code]HEGoSessionManager::SessionType[/code]: [codeblock] 1 = InProcess 2 = NewNamedPipe 3 = NewTCPSocket 4 = ExistingNamedPipe 5 = ExistingTCPSocket 6 = ExistingSharedMemory [/codeblock]
[code]connection_data[/code] is transport-specific (for example named pipe string or socket endpoint data).
Returns [code]true[/code] on successful session startup and initialization.

method.name: stop_session
method.description:
Stops the active Houdini Engine session and releases session resources.
Returns [code]true[/code] when shutdown succeeds.

method.name: poll_cook_state
method.description:
Returns the current HAPI cook status as an integer.
Used together with [method HEGoAssetNode.cook_async] to poll for cook completion each frame. The returned value maps to [code]HAPI_State[/code]: [codeblock] 0 = HAPI_STATE_READY (cook finished successfully) 1 = HAPI_STATE_READY_WITH_FATAL_ERRORS 2 = HAPI_STATE_READY_WITH_COOK_ERRORS 3 = HAPI_STATE_MAX_READY_STATE 4 = HAPI_STATE_STARTING_COOK 5 = HAPI_STATE_COOKING 6 = HAPI_STATE_STARTING_LOAD 7 = HAPI_STATE_LOADING 8 = HAPI_STATE_MAX [/codeblock]
Values greater than 3 indicate that HAPI is still busy. Typical polling pattern in GDScript: [codeblock] hego_asset_node.cook_async() while HEGoAPI.get_singleton().poll_cook_state() > 3: await get_tree().process_frame [/codeblock]
